notes: All 9 test functions passed across 5 scenarios. scenario-13: TestAuthTransport_TokenIsolation verified token sent only to api.github.com (2 subtests). scenario-14: TestContentsAPIResponseParsing confirmed Contents API JSON parsing. scenario-15: TestValidateDownloadURL validated hostname allowlist with 9 subtests covering allowed hosts, disallowed hosts, non-HTTPS, and malformed URLs. scenario-16: 5 test functions covered cache lifecycle -- TestCacheLifecycleAndFetchRecipeValidation (round-trip, freshness, stale detection, invalid URL rejection), TestCacheManager_SizeAndEviction, TestCacheManager_IsRecipeFresh (nil/fresh/stale), TestCacheManager_IncompleteSourceMeta (shorter TTL for incomplete), TestGitHubClient_ListRecipes_CacheHit. scenario-17: TestGitHubClient_RateLimitHandling verified header parsing and guidance messages with/without token (3 subtests).
